title: Culinary Picnic
description: Adds more food and drinks to Minecraft!
body:
## Description
Food is scarce in Minecraft. "Culinary Picnic" will add drinks and food. Some of them can remove negative effects. Stay tuned, there will be more food in the future!
## Adds
- Adds 6 types of pies.
- Adds bread with honey.
- Adds cherry.
- Adds 3 drinks.
## Examples
### Melon pie
![Melon pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fc9db3a839f3b825cd81c27a9dc198a3a28408c.png)
![Melon pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fc9db3a839f3b825cd81c27a9dc198a3a28408c.png)
![Melon pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fc9db3a839f3b825cd81c27a9dc198a3a28408c.png)

<details>
<summary>Characteristics</summary>

Nutrition - 8.

Saturation - 4.

Removes effects - poison, darkness.

</details>

### Bread with honey
![Bread with honey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cde9387d0d36959d801b162abbb1aeca84b50bf.png)
![Bread with honey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cde9387d0d36959d801b162abbb1aeca84b50bf.png)
![Bread with honey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cde9387d0d36959d801b162abbb1aeca84b50bf.png)

<details>
<summary>Characteristics</summary>

Nutrition - 5.

Saturation - 6.

Removes effects - poison.

</details>

### Berry juice
![Berry juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4db6514827d96fff70d29bed8b86d0a9dad5d6eb.png)
![Berry juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4db6514827d96fff70d29bed8b86d0a9dad5d6eb.png)
![Berry juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4db6514827d96fff70d29bed8b86d0a9dad5d6eb.png)

<details>
<summary>Characteristics</summary>

Nutrition - 3.

Saturation - 2.

Removes effects - unluck.

</details>

## Recipes
Food and drink recipes in the gallery.

## Warning
Don't forget to install the resource pack! Without it, textures and item names won't be displayed!
